title: columnea zebrina
intro: Columnea zebrina, also known as the zebra houseplant or striped columnea, is a type of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, where it grows as an epiphyte on trees and rocks. The leaves of the Columnea zebrina plant have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including fever and respiratory problems, due to their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The leaves can be prepared into herbal teas or infusions, and the plant's extracts have been used in various traditional remedies, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
